name: Elevenses
description: 1920s socialites compete to serve the finest morning tea by playing cards with special actions to build the best spread.

name: Monty Python Fluxx
description: The ever-changing card game meets the absurdity of Monty Python. Rules and goals shift every turn.

name: Monster Fluxx
description: Fluxx with a classic monster movie theme. Collect Keepers like vampires and werewolves while the rules constantly change.

name: We Didn't Playtest This at All
description: Chaotic micro card game where you're trying not to lose. Games last seconds to minutes with absurd win/loss conditions.

name: UNO
description: The classic colour and number matching card game. Be the first to empty your hand while hitting others with Draw Twos and Skips.

name: Man Bites Dog
description: Create hilarious newspaper headlines from word cards. The most sensational headline wins the round.

name: Meow
description: A cat-themed party card game of hidden roles and adorable feline chaos.

name: Schrödinger's Cats
description: Quantum physics meets poker-style bluffing. Bid on the total number of cat states across all players' hands.

name: Entropy: Worlds Collide
description: Parallel worlds have collided. Use simultaneous action selection and unique character abilities to find shards of your reality and get home first.

name: Entropy: Worlds Collide – Echo of Time
description: Expansion for Entropy: Worlds Collide adding a lore-expanding story, 1-vs-many mode, new Wanderer character, and support for up to 5 players.

name: Bears vs Babies
description: Build monstrous bears to eat terrible babies. A monster-building card game from the creators of Exploding Kittens.

name: The Resistance
description: Hidden identity game where resistance fighters try to complete missions while imperial spies attempt to sabotage them.

name: Barking Kittens (Exploding Kittens Expansion)
description: Third expansion for Exploding Kittens adding new cards and the shared-hand Barking Kittens mechanic.

name: Coup: Rebellion G54
description: Standalone Coup variant with 25 different roles. Each game uses only 5, creating massive replayability in this bluffing and deduction game.

name: Ishtar: Gardens of Babylon
description: Plant flowers and grow gardens in the desert to create the legendary Hanging Gardens of Babylon. Collect gems, buy trees, and recruit apprentices.

name: Wrong Party
description: Draft mismatched characters and party themes to create the Greatest Guest List of All Time while sabotaging your opponents' parties.

name: Fun Employed
description: Interview for absurd jobs using a hand of ridiculous qualification cards. Pitch why your bizarre skills make you the perfect candidate.

name: Flamecraft
description: Place adorable artisan dragons in shops, gather goods, and cast enchantments to become the Master of Flamecraft.

name: Machi Koro
description: Roll dice to earn income from your city's establishments and race to build all four landmarks first.

name: Risk 2210 A.D.
description: Futuristic Risk with commanders, space colonies, underwater cities, and a fixed 5-turn structure. Global domination and beyond.

name: Tic Tac K.O.: Dragons vs Unicorns
description: A diabolical twist on tic-tac-toe where teams of dragons and unicorns battle for grid control using character and magic cards.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Collect train cards and claim railway routes across the map to connect cities and complete destination tickets.

name: Ark Nova
description: Design a modern zoo focused on conservation and science. Plan enclosures, house animals, and support conservation projects to build the most successful zoo.

name: Bark Avenue
description: Manage a dog walking business in Manhattan. Balance walking multiple dogs with competing needs — walk length, activities, bathroom breaks, and compatibility.

name: It's Blunderful
description: Bet on life's awkward situations. Players predict how the group will vote on hypothetical dilemmas.

name: Machi Koro: Bright Lights, Big City
description: Standalone Machi Koro experience combining the best of the base game and expansions with a marketplace draft mechanism.

name: Sushi Go!
description: Draft sushi dishes as they fly by to score the most points. Quick, cute, and surprisingly tactical card drafting in a tin.

name: Coup
description: Bluff, manipulate, and eliminate your way to power. Claim influence over characters you may or may not have — but get caught lying and you lose.

name: Unstable Unicorns
description: Build a unicorn army and sabotage your rivals. First to seven unicorns in your stable wins — if you can survive the backstabbing.

name: Love Letter
description: Deliver your love letter to the princess using just 16 cards. Deduce opponents' hands and knock them out with a single card play each turn.

name: Exploding Kittens (NSFW Edition)
description: The adult edition of the Russian Roulette card game. Draw cards until someone draws an Exploding Kitten and is eliminated — unless they can defuse it.

name: Cards Against Humanity
description: The infamous party game for horrible people. Fill in the blank with the most outrageous answer card to win each round.
